venues.name: The Restaurant
venues.description: Main dining room with timeless elegant décor — crystal chandeliers and parquet floors. Open-seating for breakfast, lunch, and dinner. Complimentary wines and caviar served at dinner. Daily-changing contemporary menus. Complimentary.

venues.name: La Terrazza
venues.description: Italian restaurant on Deck 7. Daytime open-seating buffet with indoor and alfresco terrace seating; evening slow-food Italian à la carte with handmade pasta, buffalo mozzarella, Parma ham, and balsamic from Umbria. Approximately 70 seats for dinner. Complimentary.

venues.name: The Grill
venues.description: Casual alfresco dining by day: salads, Black Angus burgers, and grilled fish. Evening Black Rock Dining — guests cook prime meats and seafood on preheated volcanic lava stones at the table. Complimentary.

venues.name: La Dame
venues.description: The only extra-charge venue on Silver Shadow. French fine dining in partnership with Relais & Châteaux (formerly Le Champagne, rebranded fleet-wide circa 2017–2020). Intimate setting with roughly 7 candlelit tables. Six-course tasting menu: foie gras, lobster bisque, Grand Marnier soufflé. Wine pairings available. Dinner only; supplement $60 per person.

venues.name: In-Suite Dining
venues.description: Complimentary 24-hour butler-delivered in-suite dining with white-tablecloth tableware. Extensive menu including multi-course fine dining, light lunch fare, sandwiches, and desserts.
